contacts.name: Sarah Kim
contacts.title: VP Platform Engineering
contacts.notes: Technically sharp. Prefers directness. Will push back on vague answers.

contacts.name: Mark O'Brien
contacts.title: CFO
contacts.last_interaction: Added to calendar invite · this morning
contacts.notes: Added late — likely here to pressure on cost or timeline. Has final budget authority.

contacts.name: Jen Lee
contacts.title: IT Security Lead
contacts.notes: New to the deal. Likely owns IT sign-off. EU compliance will be her concern.

last_meeting.summary: Initial discovery. Sarah walked through platform architecture. EU data residency flagged as concern. Agreed to follow-up with IT and legal. Next step: technical deep-dive with Jen's team.

talking_points: Open with Redwood HQ reference — similar scale, similar EU concern, closed in 6 weeks
Confirm pilot scope before budget conversation — Mark will ask about cost first
Get Jen's sign-off criteria in writing — IT blocked Pineapple for 3 weeks without it
Ask: 'what does a successful 30-day pilot look like to you?' — close on that definition
